title: What Is AI?
description: Let's explore how computers can become smart!

scenes.speech: AI is amazing, right? Let's explore it together!
scenes.title: Welcome to the World of AI!

scenes.speech: AI learns patterns by looking at a lot of data!
scenes.title: AI Learns
scenes.content: Just like people learn from examples, AI studies many examples and finds useful patterns.

scenes.speech: Tools like ChatGPT and Claude became smart by learning from huge amounts of text!
scenes.title: Do You Know AI Chat?
scenes.content: Large language models can understand and generate natural language conversations.
scenes.highlight: 📚 Lots of text -> LLM -> AI chat

scenes.speech: AI can also help make pictures, music, programs, and more!
scenes.title: What Can AI Do?
scenes.content: AI can help create text, images, music, videos, and even code.

scenes.speech: Now you know a little more about AI. Try using it!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
